case_title: MERCHANTS ACCEPTANCE CORPORATION VS. MELVIN SANDERS

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MERCHANTS ACCEPTANCE CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANDERS, MELVIN $2,135.92 PRINCIPAL, $485.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,787.04 INTEREST, $250.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,657.96, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 63125322)

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SANDERS, MELVIN

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 18115006), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCHANTS ACCEPTANCE CORPORATION SERVED FEB-27-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE FEB-28-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT SANDERS, MELVIN
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-23-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
